subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaidens of God! The letter of the seventh of Muharram from last year has now been perused. Since until now [3.5s]... ...In this wondrous Dispensation the favours of the Glorious Lord are vouchsafed unto the handmaidens of the Merciful. Therefore, they should, like unto men, seize the prize
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیز الهی نامه هفتم محرم در سنه گذشته حال ملاحظه گردید چون تا بحال
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @methods of teaching the Cause, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
